notificaciones.texto: 📢🔝💯 Victor Wembanyama (1 block today) has passed Chet Holmgren, George Johnson, Giannis Antetokounmpo, Shai Gilgeous-Alexander and Stephen Curry and is now ranked 65th all-time with 11 in NBA Finals.
📢🔝💯 📢HOF🏛️ Mikal Bridges (1 three-pointer today) has passed Dwyane Wade, Gary Neal, Iman Shumpert, Marcus Smart, Mario Elie and Sam Cassell and is now ranked 65th all-time with 14 in NBA Finals.

📢🔝💯 📢HOF🏛️ Julian Champagnie (1 three-pointer today) has passed Allen Iverson, Andrew Nembhard, Andrew Wiggins, Anfernee Hardaway, B.J. Armstrong, Devin Booker, James Jones, Jimmy Butler, Luka Dončić, Metta World Peace, Trevor Ariza and Tyler Herro and is now ranked 88th all-time with 11 in NBA Finals.
📢🔝💯 📢HOF🏛️ Victor Wembanyama (2 blocks today) has passed Andrew Bynum, Anthony Davis, Mychal Thompson, Oliver Miller, Shawn Kemp and Vlade Divac and is now ranked 59th all-time with 12 in NBA Finals.
📢🔝💯 Victor Wembanyama (3 blocks today) has passed Dan Majerle and Pascal Siakam and is now ranked 57th all-time with 13 in NBA Finals.
